html:
Flint is an item used to craft basic tools. It can be found on the ground or by mining smooth or gold veined Boulders with the Pickaxe. Flint is not flammable and easy to find on the surface, although eventually it can be used up. More can be found by venturing into a Cave, however.

Flint can be given to Rock Lobsters to befriend them. Like all mineral items, they are food sources for Slurtles and Snurtles.

Flint is one of the first and most needed items in the game and should be sought after as soon as a new game starts. It is recommended to always have a decent number of flint at all times in the case the player needs to make basic Tools such as an Axe or a Pickaxe. Combat wise, the Spear can be built.

Flint is a renewable resource:

  • In Reign of Giants, it can be farmed from Moleworms, Rock Lobsters, and from Earthquakes in the caves.
  • In Shipwrecked, it's rather more difficult, being generated by the Slot Machine and from mined or hatched Dragoon Eggs.
  • In Hamlet it's a very common drop from Dung Balls which are renewable if you also kill the Dung Beetle. Also they are available at the Pigg and Pigglet's General Store for 1x each.

Nutrition Facts

Critter Produces Notes
Flint has a mineral value of 1.
Loyalty (When hand-fed) Adds 3 minutes (6 day segments) of Follower time.
Nothing! Will stave off their starvation atleast.

"flint"
“It's a very sharp rock.”
–Wilson
“The poor man's fire-starter.”
–Willow
“Is rock, but eh, pointy.”
–Wolfgang
“A tiny blade-like rock.”
–Wendy
“THIS ROCK IS SHARPER THAN MOST”
–WX-78
“A hard nodule of quartz.”
–Wickerbottom
“This could be an axe head.”
–Woodie
“Ow! I cut my finger!”
–Maxwell
“Its sharpness can be exploited to build many rudimentary tools.”
–Wagstaff
“Vital för spear cönstructiön.”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, to feel a sharp edge against my skin.”
–Webber
“This rock doesn't roll.”
–Walani
“Sharp as can be!”
–Warly
“Thet rock 'olds an edge.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS ROCK”
–Wilba
“Sharp stone”
–Wormwood
“Looks useful. I should go hunting for more of these.”
–Wheeler
“So archaic...”
–Winona
“My eye was caught by its dull glint.”
–Wortox
“Glorph! It sharp!”
–Wurt
“This should come in handy!”
–Walter
“Aha, I've found some flint!”
–Wanda
